task: Type-3 DFIG Crowbar current semantic closure and 5 s fault-resistance voltage-sag sweep

scope.model_changes_allowed: Only existing Three Phase Fault Fault ON Resistance was changed through PSCAD GUI during the sweep.

fixed_conditions.fault_location: Existing ABC-G fault at Type-3 22 kV POC / collector-side, left of BRK_DFIG

crowbar_current_semantics.measurement_location: Internal Crowbar_prot crowbar branch current measurement feeding Output Channel title Crowbar current
crowbar_current_semantics.unit: internal crowbar branch current; unit not independently confirmed by GUI or PGB metadata
crowbar_current_semantics.phase_index_mapping: not independently confirmed; vector indices 1..3 retained as exported
crowbar_current_semantics.state_signal: S1 / DFIG_CROWBAR_STATE drives the crowbar switch input in GUI evidence; in all sweep scenarios it remained inactive (0).

parser.method: Each scenario parsed its copied 3IBR.inf; PGB n maps to 3IBR_XX.out with 10 channels per file and first column time.

semantic_limits: Crowbar current:1..3 are confirmed as crowbar branch current, but unit is not independently confirmed if the PSCAD component does not expose a unit label.
Crowbar current positive direction remains unconfirmed unless explicitly observed in the GUI.
Exact A/B/C mapping of vector indices 1..3 remains unconfirmed unless explicitly observed in the GUI.
DFIG_IFLT_A/B/C_KA are external fault-element currents, not internal converter or crowbar branch currents.
Freq_PLL is a Type-3 internal PLL candidate and is not a substitute for system frequency.

adaptive_scan_decision.reason: 0.30 ohm and 1.00 ohm already produced VIBR1_2 minima above 0.70 pu, satisfying the stop rule for not adding 3.00 ohm.

final_restore.evidence: Final PSCAD GUI run completed after restoring Fault ON Resistance to 0.01 ohm; copied outputs parsed from local gf46 directory.

limitations: This is an exploratory sweep, not a paper-case reproduction and not an LVRT grid-code compliance claim.
Crowbar current unit, phase-index mapping, and positive direction remain not independently confirmed.
S1 remained 0 in all scenarios, so no scenario supports a statement that crowbar actually conducted.
Freq_PLL remains Type-3 internal PLL candidate and must not replace SPD30 system frequency.
Fault-current channels DFIG_IFLT_A/B/C_KA are external fault branch currents, not RSC/GSC/crowbar internal currents.
